message:
feat(core): Outcome<T,E> error handling strategy (wa-d0m4t)

Add Cancelled/Panicked error variants to Error enum for structured
cancellation and panic propagation from asupersync. Update outcome.rs
adapter to use distinct variants instead of Runtime, add ResultExt
trait, public re-exports, and outcome_adapter benchmark.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -104,6 +104,11 @@ name = "cx_creation"
 harness = false
 required-features = ["asupersync-runtime"]
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "cx_propagation"
+harness = false
+required-features = ["asupersync-runtime"]
+
 [[bench]]
 name = "sizing_benchmark"
 harness = false
@@ -153,6 +158,25 @@ harness = false
 name = "scrollback_eviction"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "outcome_vs_result"
+harness = false
+required-features = ["asupersync-runtime"]
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "differential_snapshot"
+harness = false
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "outcome_adapter"
+harness = false
+required-features = ["asupersync-runtime"]
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "spike_comparison"
+harness = false
+required-features = ["asupersync-runtime"]
+
 [features]
 default = []
 # Public feature flags (stable surface)
